name: Iso11783OPChangePolygonPoint
title: Iso11783OPChangePolygonPoint
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangePolygonPoint( dword ecuHandle, dword polygonID, dword index, dword x, dword y );
description: The function changes the position of a point of a polygon object. A Change Polygon Point command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
